answer:
The Help Scout Mailbox API v2 uses OAuth 2.0 with Authorization Code and Client Credentials flows [1]. You must create an OAuth2 application via Your Profile > My apps to obtain a client ID and secret [1]. All requests require an Authorization header [1]:

```
Authorization: Bearer {access_token}
```

The separate Docs API uses API keys via HTTP Basic Authentication, where the key is the username and a dummy value is the password [2]:

```
curl --user API_KEY:X https://docsapi.helpscout.net/v1/collections
```

Restricted Docs sites use a custom JWT-based callback authentication flow [3].
